title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — kubeadm.alpha.kubernetes.io/cri-socket (deprecated)
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
kubeadm.alpha.kubernetes.io/cri-socket: unix:///run/containerd/container.sock
Used on: Node

Type: Annotation
Example:
kubeadm.kubernetes.io/etcd.advertise-client-urls: https://172.17.0.18:2379
Used on: Pod
Annotation that kubeadm places on locally managed etcd Pods to keep track of
a list of URLs where etcd clients should connect to.
This is used mainly for etcd cluster health check purposes.
